RO elements installation detail 8. RO element installation(1)
Person B &C
Person A
Mind the RO element direction
- Person A : Hold RO element in pressure vessel
- Person B & C : Keep next RO element in line with pressure vessel.
and push RO element gently.

RO elements installation detail 8. RO element installation(5) Final push
- Push lead RO element slightly into pressure vessel by hand.
- Push lead RO element gently again by pipe until end element touch
to thrust ring in brine side. Using pipe is more easy and safety.

Copyright © 2010 Toray Industries, Inc. All rights reserved.

RO elements installation detail

chunks.text:
010 Toray Industries, Inc. All rights reserved.

RO elements installation detail 9. Shimming (1)
- Shimming reduces the free gap in the pressure
vessel of horizontal direction.
- Shimming helps to minimize RO element
movement inside the vessel, when the system
is shut down and re-started.
- Shimming helps to minimize O-ring movement
against the sealing surfaces, so reducing wear
and possibility of “rolling” O-rings. This reduces
leakage.

Copyright © 2010 Toray Industries, Inc. All rights reserved.

RO elements installation detail
Permeate

RO elements installation detail 10. Set feed side end plate
- Clean end plate
- Put lubricant on brine seal and O-rings
- Set feed side end plate
- Follow pressure vessel supplier’s manual when you set the end plate.
